main.description: Notify that a space was deleted by its authority. Sent by the authority to members' repo hosts and registered syncers; delivery is best-effort. Syncers should delete every copy of the space's data they hold; repo hosts should flag the member's repo as belonging to a deleted space. Authenticated with service auth.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.
